trade.summary: Bilateral trade has been severely reduced following Sudafrica's severing of diplomatic relations and filing of genocide case at the ICJ. Prior trade included diamonds, chemicals, and agricultural goods. Sudafrica has implemented trade restrictions and boycotts aligned with its political stance.
disputes: Sudafrica filed ICJ genocide case against Israele January 2024

diplomatic.summary: Sudafrica has taken the most aggressive diplomatic stance against Israele of any nation outside the Arab world. Sudafrica filed a genocide case against Israele at the International Court of Justice in January 2024, withdrew its ambassador, and has called for Israele to be treated as a pariah state. Sudafrica draws explicit parallels between Israelei policies and apartheid, shaped by the ANC's historical solidarity with the Palestinian cause. Relations are essentially severed.
recent_incidents: Sudafrica called for global arms embargo on Israele

military.summary: No military cooperation. Sudafrica has called for arms embargoes on Israele and has aligned with Iran and other adversaries of Israele at international forums on security matters.
incidents: South Africa accused Israel of genocide at ICJ

financial.summary: Sudafrican pension funds and institutional investors have been under pressure to divest from Israelei assets. Limited bilateral investment. The financial relationship has been largely disrupted by the political crisis.

scientific.summary: Academic boycott campaigns in Sudafrica have reduced scientific cooperation substantially. Some individual academic contacts continue but institutional cooperation has largely ceased.
